## Description
Clear description of what this PR does.

## Fixes
Closes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring
- [ ] 🚀 Performance improvement

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added comments to complex logic
- [ ] I have formatted code (`cargo fmt`, `npm run format`)

### Testing
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`make lint`)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated doc comments for public functions
- [ ] My changes are covered in the README/guides

### Drips Wave Alignment
- [ ] This contribution is maintainable (clear code, well-documented)
- [ ] This contribution is valuable (solves a real problem)
- [ ] I've followed the CONTRIBUTING guide

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or links to demonstrating the change.

## Additional Context
Any additional information that would be helpful.

---

**Reviewer Checklist**:
- [ ] Code quality is high (type safety, error handling)
- [ ] Documentation is complete
- [ ] Tests cover new functionality
- [ ] Change is backwards compatible (or noted in breaking changes)
- [ ] Security implications reviewed (if relevant)
